instructions: This repo is the faqmd converter tool and opencode agent skills.
All scripts are zero-dependency Node.js. Run `npm test` before committing.
Generated artifacts (walkthrough.md, guide/, node_modules/) must not be committed.

Skills live in ./skills/ and are mirrored in ./.opencode/skills/ for per-repo discovery. The global copies under ~/.config/opencode/skills/ are installed mirrors; use `npm run sync-skills` to update them.
